days.summary: ByteDance Seed surfaced the strongest concrete artifact with Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview on Arena alongside its new Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM, signaling continued competition in multimodal and voice-native foundation models. Zhipu AI expanded its Intel partnership to ship on-device Zhipu Qingyan and CodeGeeX for AI PCs, while NVIDIA positioned Dynamo as a new inference stack for agentic coding workloads where repeated API calls and KV-cache inefficiency drive cost.
